scope: Runtime gate for source-position alignment in the TorchTitan MORI AsyncLL staged dX path.

torchtitan_mori_aiter_moe.change: Added TORCHTITAN_MORI_AITER_ASYNCLL_ALIGN_MODE with src_pos and route_key modes. The staged AsyncLL path can now align x/grad/top-k rows by source-position only or by strict route key.

launcher.change: Forwarded CANARY_MORI_AITER_ASYNCLL_ALIGN_MODE through check-config, run, print-command, and the run header.

s128_staged_asyncll.read: Short-sequence integrated training can complete with staged AsyncLL.

s4096_route_key_repro.read: Strict route-key alignment is too strong for independent AsyncLL handles at S4096 with real TorchTitan router output.

s4096_src_pos_retry.read: Source-position-only alignment also fails at S4096. The timing sidecar has partial records because some ranks progressed farther before rank 3 tripped the source-position guard.

conclusion.read: Neither route-key nor source-position alignment is a valid production contract for the current independent x/grad/top-k AsyncLL handles at S4096. Keep the retained path on sync registered combine. The next viable overlap branch must reuse/share MORI route-order metadata or carry explicit per-dispatched-row route identity, then rerun the seeded S4096 parity gate before any no-profile throughput A/B.
